rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly requests reordering the paragraphs to improve the narrative arc of the section.
rationale.RX.1: Any proposed restructuring must not obscure any uncertainties mentioned in the original text.
rationale.RX.2: The reordered text must not inadvertently strengthen claims beyond what the original text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The task is strictly limited to reordering existing content, not rewriting, editing, or adding new material.
rationale.RX.4: The restructuring should not alter the technical content in a way that could lead to misapplication.
rationale.RX.5: The final output must clearly indicate that it is a restructured version of the original artifact.
